SOURCE: 17150707.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (17150707.pdf)
SUMMARY: Versatile HR professional with a strong benefits administration background, progressive cross-functional experience in broad range of HR functions including; HRIS, state and federal reporting, project management, client and vendor relation management, HR regulations, employee relations, HR policies and procedures, training, candidate screening and interviewing, employee oversight
SKILLS: administrative, ADP, backup, Benefits, counseling, client, customer support, Documentation, forms, HRIS, human resource, Human Resources, HR, law, Director, market, Microsoft Office, payroll, PeopleSoft, personnel, policies, processes, reporting, researching, SAP, technical support

SOURCE: 17150707.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Shared Services Analyst
COMPANY: 
DATES: September 2015 to Current
DESCRIPTION: Provide customer support for HRIS questions and issues, assist in addressing inquiries from employees, managers, and internal HRBPs, perform audits of data entered into HR systems, establish guidelines for setting up standard reports, complete HR transactional activities as needed, suggest methods to update processes, conduct data audits, fulfill general reporting requests

SOURCE: 17150707.pdf
JOB TITLE: Human Resources Representative
COMPANY: 
DATES: January 2014 to February 2015
DESCRIPTION: Daily support for administration of all University benefits programs, maintain Staff Compensation System, provide daily administration and counseling on benefits systems, perform day-to-day HR functions, interpret personnel policies, provide training, support retirees, offer technical support

SOURCE: 17150707.pdf
JOB TITLE: Benefits Manager/HRIS Specialist
COMPANY: 
DATES: June 2012 to January 2014
DESCRIPTION: Manage employee benefits programs and HRIS, document HR processes, provide excellent service while ensuring compliance with employment laws, oversee benefit enrollment process, serve as primary contact for faculty, staff, and retirees

SOURCE: 17150707.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Specialist
COMPANY: 
DATES: December 2007 to July 2011
DESCRIPTION: Managed annual open enrollment, payroll-related functions, supervised vendor processes for enrollment, created test plans for HR portal, maintained client research mailbox

SOURCE: 17150707.pdf
JOB TITLE: Specialist
COMPANY: 
DATES: November 2006 to December 2007
DESCRIPTION: Processed short term disability payments, administered leave of absences, responsible for reporting and metrics
